ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "uid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for the user */,
  "indegree_rank" REAL /* Logarithmic scale of indegree rank of the user */,
  "activity_level" REAL /* Logarithmic scale of activity level of the user */,
  "followers_count" REAL /* Logarithmic scale of followers count of the user */,
  "cross_domain_capability" INTEGER /* Cross-domain capability level of the user (1 for yes, 2 for no) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Last date the user was active */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The user's timezone */,
  "language" TEXT /* The primary language used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uid")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "uid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user, also acts as a foreign key */,
  "male_count" INTEGER /* Count of male followers */,
  "female_count" INTEGER /* Count of female followers */,
  "other_gender_count" INTEGER /* Count of followers identifying as other genders */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uid")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "uid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user, also acts as a foreign key */,
  "v1" INTEGER /* Metric v1 representing some engagement level */,
  "v0" INTEGER /* Metric v0 representing another engagement measurement */,
  "v2" INTEGER /* Metric v2 representing further engagement measurement */,
  "v3" INTEGER /* Metric v3 indicating last engagement measurement */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Composite score representing overall engagement */,
  "interaction_count" INTEGER /* Total number of interactions (likes, comments, shares) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uid")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for brand-related inquiries */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry the brand operates in */,
  "website" TEXT /* The brand's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the engagement record */,
  "uid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user, also acts as a foreign key */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the brand, also acts as a foreign key */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., like, comment, share) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  "platform" TEXT /* The social media platform where the interaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_uid FOREIGN KEY ("uid") REFERENCES users ("uid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "uid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user, also acts as a foreign key */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the engagement metrics and insights */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Username or ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_uid FOREIGN KEY ("uid") REFERENCES users ("uid")
)
